meaning: English rule benefits those who bark (protest).

text: अकटको कुलो, बिकटको खेत, बिसँछु दाजै शिलोकको फेद
meaning: A canal on a slope, a field on a cliff, I remember the base of the Shilok.

text: अकबर राजा, बिरबल काजि, इन्साफ दिन्छन खुसिराजि
meaning: King Akbar, Minister Birbal, happy judge delivers justice.
Akbari gold doesn't need a touchstone to prove its purity.

text: अक्चु खाए बक्छु खाए झुसे बारुलो
meaning: Stung by a wasp? Just eat bitter gourd and eggplant.
A dog hit by a stick is even scared of lightning.
Even a stick doesn't burn without a spark.

text: अघि हेर्नु चार हात, पछि हेर्नु बाह हात
meaning: Look four cubits forward, eight cubits back.
Today's bitterness is tomorrow's sweetness.

text: अचानो को पिर खुकुरी ले जान्दैन
meaning: A khukuri cannot cut away the worry of a lame person.

text: अचार खानु मुलाको, संगत गर्नु ठुलाको
meaning: Eat pickles from radish, but keep company with the elders.

text: अच्छा साले जुल्फी पाले, लिखाले टांग हाले
meaning: The good brother-in-law grows long hair, the writer scribbles a note.
God provides food for the python.
A stuck and cracked oil lamp.

text: अदुवा खाई सभामा बस, मुला खाई बन पस
meaning: Eat ginger and sit in the assembly, eat radish and go to the forest.
Mustard during famine, barley during good times.
In famine, give neither man nor food.

text: अनिकालमा लाईफ जोगाउनु, आन्दोलनमा बाईक जोगाउनु
meaning: Save your life during famine, save your bike during a movement.
In famine, eat together sharing whatever you have.

text: अनुहार न दनुवार पोइ खोज्न थाली
meaning: She has no face or teeth, but started looking for a husband.
No face, no teeth, but a Pandava son-in-law is desired.

text: अन्धाको देशमा आँखा छोप्नु, लङ्गडाको देशमा खुट्टा खोच्याउनु
meaning: In the land of the blind, cover your eyes; in the land of the lame, limp.
The support of the blind is the lame.
A lamp in the hands of a blind person.
A blind man searching for a mirror.
Strength lies in the time of trouble, not in the food.
Never call wealth earned through injustice your own.

text: अभागी मोरो हरुन बस्यो, बाह हातको घाँचो पस्यो
meaning: The unlucky one's peacock flew away, and an eight-cubit splinter got stuck.

text: अभागीको भाई सप्नन्छ, भाग्यमानीको छोरो सप्नन्छ
meaning: The unlucky one's brother sleeps, the lucky one's son sleeps.

text: अराएको काम र भराएको मानोले कति दिन चल्छ
meaning: How long can a borrowed work and a borrowed plow last?

text: अरुको बारिको काँक्रो चोर्नी, आफ्नो भने नुनको ढिको नफोर्नी
meaning: Steal cucumbers from another's garden, but don't break your own salt block.

text: अरूले हाती चढे भनेर आफूले धुरी चढ्नु हुँदैन
meaning: Don't climb a pole just because others ride an elephant.

text: अर्काको आङ्गको जुमा देख्ने, आफ्नो आङ्गको भैसी पनि नदेख्ने
meaning: Sees the lice in another's yard, but not the buffalo in his own.

text: अर्काको गहना लगाउनु, नाक कान दुखाउनु
meaning: Wearing another's jewelry only hurts your nose and ears.
Another's claim becomes a noose around the neck.
Licking another's calf, the mouth is full of fur.

text: अर्काको बारीमा साग छ, मुटु मिचेर के लाग्छ
meaning: There are greens in another's field, why squeeze your heart for it?

text: आफ्नो टाउको फुटे पिछि अर्काको टाउको बेल
meaning: Only after your own head cracks, you wish another's head had cracked.

text: आफ्नो थैली सुरक्षित राखे अर्कालाई दोष लगाउनु पर्दैन
meaning: Secure your own purse first, then you don't have to blame others.

text: आफ्नो थैलोको गाँठो कस्नु, अरुलाई दोष नदिनु
meaning: Tighten the knot of your own bag, don't blame others.

text: आफ्नो नुन, आफ्नै पानी, खाउ ज्वाई कोखा तानी
meaning: Eat your own salt and water, son-in-law, even if you have to tighten your belt.
One must make their own destiny.

text: आफ्नो रुचि खानु, अर्काको रुचि लाउनु
meaning: Eat according to your own taste, apply what others like.
One's own hand is Lord Jagannath (the ultimate provider).

text: आमा पिन ब्युटी छोरि पिन ब्युटी बाउले गर्नु पर्ने चुलाको ड्युटी
meaning: Mother is pin beauty, daughter is pin beauty, father has to do the stove duty.

text: आमा बाबुको मन छोरा छोरी माथि, छोरा छोरीको मन डिडगो जुता माथि
meaning: Parents' mind is on children, children's mind is on new shoes.

text: आमा बाबुलाई समस्या टान गाहाँ, छोराछोरीलाई भने स्टाईल नै प्यारो
meaning: Parents find it hard to pull through problems, children only love style.

text: आमा-बाबा को मन छोरा तिर, छोरा को मन अर्काको छोरी तिर
meaning: Father and mother's mind is on their son, the son's mind is on another's daughter.
A mother's love is on the edge of her eyelid.

text: आमाबाबुको मन छोराछोरी माथि छोराछोरीको मन ढुंगामुदा माथि
meaning: Parents' mind is on children, children's mind is on stones and mortar.
Mother-son is about care and comfort, father-son is about transactions and obligations.

text: आम्दानी चार आनाको खर्च बाहू आनाको
meaning: Income is four annas, expenditure is twelve annas (living beyond one's means).
A son with long life is afraid of a little gas (being overly cautious about small things).

text: आयो गयो माया मोह, आएन गएन को हो को हो
meaning: Love and attachment come and go; who is who if they don't come or go?
Eating potatoes but pretending to have the status of a sweet peda.

text: इखालु स्वास्नीको बचन, बहूला कुकुरको दाँत बराबर
meaning: A jealous wife's words are like the teeth of a barking dog.
Talking about heaven in front of Lord Indra (showing off to the expert).
One forehead, two ropes (torn between two responsibilities).

text: एउटा पोईको दुईटा जोई, ख्वाउने बेलामा कोही न कोही
meaning: One husband has two wives; when it's time to eat, someone always shows up.

text: एउटा भए सरासर, दुइटा भए भराभर, तिनवटा भए टाउको फोराफोर
meaning: One is straightforward, two are quarrelsome, three break each other's heads.

text: एउटा सियो चोर अर्को फाली चोर
meaning: One steals a needle, another steals an axe (different scales of wrongdoing).
One caused the trouble, another suffered the consequence.
One ear, two ears, and the field (everyone has a different way of hearing).

text: एक कानले सुन्यो, अर्को कानले उडायो
meaning: Heard with one ear, let it fly out the other.

text: एक घर विष्ट, दश घर कामी, जस्ता तिमी उस्तै हामी
meaning: One house of Bisht, ten houses of Kami; you are like us.

text: एक छाक खाने जोगी, दुई छाक खाने भोगी, तीन छाक खाने रोगी
meaning: Eating once a day is a hermit, twice a day is a householder, thrice a day is a patient.

text: एक थुकी सुकी, सय थुकी नदी
meaning: One spit dries up, a hundred spits become a river.
A thief once is a thief forever.
One path, two tasks (two birds with one stone).
One Magh month does not end the winter.

text: एक रुपैंया धन छ, घोडा किन्छु भन्छ
meaning: He has only one rupee but says he'll buy a horse.
One hand cannot clap.
Unity is strength.
Storm on one side, suspension bridge on the other.
A lonely Brihaspati (Thursday) is false.

text: ओखरबोटमा चिल बस्यो, देखेपछि दिल बस्यो
meaning: A kite sat on a walnut tree; after seeing it, the heart became calm.

text: ओरालो लागेको मृगलाई बाच्छाले पनि खेद्छ
meaning: Even a calf chases a deer that is going downhill.
While giving a finger, swallows the whole hand.
Medicine and advice are never sweet.
Buy on the new moon and throw away on the full moon.

text: कड्गालको जात छैन, बोक्सीको गाउँ छैन
meaning: A sword has no caste, a witch has no village.
An inexperienced doctor's dose is a journey to the land of death.
Where did you get lost, butter, in the churning?
Sometimes on the lap, sometimes hand on the knee.

text: कतै दिन, कतै रात, एकातिर भोक अर्कोतिर भात
meaning: Somewhere day, somewhere night; hunger on one side, rice on the other.
Applying medicine for a headache on the navel.
The topknot is shorter than the hair.
A drop of urine is a landslide for an ant.
Eating ghee wrapped in a blanket (hiding wealth while enjoying it).
A curved knife for a crooked person.
A trip to Kalibood is a trade of thighs.
A goat crying in front of a butcher.

text: कसाईको अगाडी बाख्राको आँसुको के अर्थ
meaning: What does a goat's tear mean in front of a butcher?
Which part of the loom carries which load?
One man's food is another man's poison.

text: कसैलाई के धन्दा घरज्वाईलाई खानको धन्दा
meaning: The only worry for a live-in son-in-law is worry about food.
For some, a lakh; for others, a slope.

text: कसैले तपाईं भनोस् नभनोस् आफैं मपाई
meaning: Whether someone calls you you or not, be your own master.

text: कस्ता कस्ता कहाँ गए मुसाको बच्चा दरबारमा
meaning: All kinds have gone; a mouse's child is in the palace.
Where are you going, fish, in my basket?
A festival that doesn't exist, celebrated at Pragya Pratisthan.
A festival that doesn't exist, celebrated in Handi village.

text: काका भन्नु र कान्छा बाऊ भन्नु एउटै कुरो हो
meaning: Calling someone uncle and calling them youngest father is the same thing.

text: काग कराउदै गर्छ, पिना सुक्दै गर्छ
meaning: The crow keeps cawing while the anvil keeps drying.
When the crow sits, the branch breaks.

text: काग बाठो भयो भने गु खान्छ
meaning: If the crow becomes clever, it eats feces.
The cuckoo is smarter than the crow.
A crow erases the name of a crow.
An egret among crows.

text: कागलाई बेल पाक्यो, हर्ष न विस्मात्
meaning: The wood apple is ripe for the crow, neither joy nor sorrow.
The crow calls the cuckoo black.
For a one-eyed ox, there is no new moon or full moon.

text: काम गुरो एकातिर कुम्लो बोकी ठिमीतिर
meaning: The main task is one way, carrying the basket is towards Thimi.

text: काम गर्दा नोकरले जसरी, खाना खाँदा राजाले जसरी
meaning: Work like a servant, eat like a king.

text: काम गर्ने कालु मकै खाने भालु
meaning: Kalu does the work, the bear eats the corn.

text: काम गर्ने हनुमान, पगदी कस्ने ढेडु
meaning: Hanuman does the work, the monkey tightens the turban.

text: काम छैन बुहारी पाडाको कन्डो कनाएर बस
meaning: Daughter-in-law has nothing to do, so she sits scratching the calf's back.

text: काम छउन्जेल भाँडो, काम सकिएपछि ठाँडो
meaning: While there is work, it's a vessel; after work is done, it's cold.
No work or duty, but an enemy of the grain.
No work or shelter, but the stomach is full of food.

text: काम पनि छैन दाम पनि छैन
meaning: No work, no money either.

text: काम पाईनस् बुहारी पाडाको ढाड कन्याई दे
meaning: Daughter-in-law didn't get work, so she bends the calf's back.

text: काम साँचे आफूलाई, खान साँचे अरूलाई
meaning: Save work for yourself, save food for others.
The blacksmith's turn comes in Kartik.
A blacksmith's wedding has eighteen problems.
When blacks unite, let's eat the rooster.
Black letters are equal to a buffalo.
A black cloud doesn't always produce rain.

text: कालो बाहून, गोरो शुद्र, यिनीदेखि डराउँछन् महारुद्र
meaning: Dark Brahmin, light Shudra; even Lord Shiva is afraid of them.
The dog's path to Kashi.
Why are you crying, Mangale? In your own way.

text: किनेको दाउरा किनेकै पानी, कर्मचारीका श्रीमती महलका रानी
meaning: Bought firewood has its own water; a clerk's wife is a palace queen.

text: कुकुर भुक्दै गर्छ, हाती लम्केँदै गर्छ
meaning: The dog keeps barking, the elephant keeps walking.

text: कुकुरको पुच्छर बाह्र बर्ष सम्म ढुङ्गोमा राखेपनी बाड्गाको बाड्गो
meaning: A dog's tail remains crooked even if kept on a stone for twelve years.
Meat is a delicacy for a dog.
A dog cannot digest ghee.
Mange for a dog.

text: कुकुरले खुट्टा टोक्यो भन्दैमा कुकुरको खुट्टा टोक्नु हुन्न
meaning: Just because a dog bit your leg, you don't bite the dog's leg.
A bone is a delicacy for a dog.

text: कुचोले बढानु पर्ने कसिड्गर हावाले उडायो
meaning: The dust that should be removed by a broom was blown away by the wind.
Either a spear or a daughter-in-law, eating soybeans.
A spear's Mahadev is filled with ash.

text: कुग्री बुढीलाई उठी सुख न बसी सुख
meaning: For a hunchbacked old woman, there is no comfort in standing or sitting.

text: कुमालेको चक्र घुमी फिरी त्यहीं आउँछ
meaning: The potter's wheel keeps spinning and comes back to the same place.

text: कुरो र कुलो जता लग्यो त्यतै जान्छ
meaning: A conversation and a canal go wherever you lead them.
Panche baja at a cremation.
What are you looking for, one-eyed man?
What are you looking for, leader? A chair.

text: केटाकेटी आए, गुलेली खेलाए, मट्याड्याको सत्यानाश
meaning: Children came, played with the slingshot, and destroyed the muddy thing.

text: केटी हेर्न नपर्ने, केटो बोल्ने नपर्ने
meaning: A girl shouldn't have to look, a boy shouldn't have to speak.
A Khas's words are like a knife in the stomach.

text: खसी जोख्नु सय चोटि, मान्छे जोख्नु एक चोटि
meaning: Weigh a goat a hundred times, but weigh a person just once.
Show a goat but mate a pumpkin.

text: खसी भनम बोसो छैन, बोको भनम नसो छैन
meaning: Don't say the goat has no fat; don't say the he-goat has no tendon.
Eat or wear, after death it's all useless.

text: खाई न पाई छालाको टोपी लाई
meaning: Neither ate nor got, but puts on a leather cap.
Neither ate nor got, but wears a tie over the gown.

text: खाउँ कर्कली, पेट फर्कली, नखाउँ कर्कली, सासू झर्कली
meaning: If I eat the stir-fried greens, my stomach turns; if I don't, my mother-in-law is annoyed.
Eat if you want, otherwise pull.

text: खान जाने औषधि, खान नजाने विष
meaning: What is medicine for one is poison for another.

text: खाने पिउने रामे, चोट पाउने चामे
meaning: Rame does the eating and drinking, Chame gets the beating.

text: खाने बेलामा घिन नसम्झुनु, सुन्ने बेलामा ऋण नसम्झुनु
meaning: Don't remember disgust while eating, don't remember debt while listening.
A mustache does not block the eating mouth.
Refuse out of custom, but after eating, four mana.
Ate mud, mouth turned the other way.
Feeds rice pudding but wipes the mouth with mud.
If you have feet, you can walk the whole world.
If you have feet, there are a thousand shoes.
The feast is incomplete without chili pepper.

text: खुस्किन लागेको हाकिमलाई पिउनले पनि लखेट्छ
meaning: Even a dog chases a fleeing officer.
Scare the farmhand, terrify the guest.

text: खेताला लाए छैन काम, छोराछोरी पठाए आधा काम, आफू गए पुरै काम
meaning: Hiring a laborer does no work; sending children does half work; going yourself does full work.
One's own farming is good, another's wife is good.
Crossed the river but forgot the stick.
Rivers and love flow downward.
In a land of rivers, there is shortage of water.
A donkey does not get up until the load is on.
A thundering cloud does not rain.

text: गहिराको घरलाई पहिराको डर, डाँडाको घरलाई जाडाको डर
meaning: A house in a deep gorge fears a landslide; a house on a hill fears the cold.
Leave the morsel, but do not leave the company.
A cow is equal to the Ganges.

text: गाउँ भरिको साईनो, पानी खान पाइन
meaning: All the relatives in the village, but no water to drink.
No water in the pot, but liquid in the churn.
A crow's wing in front of a vulture.
A singer is known by his whistling.

text: गु खानेले गु खाए पनि मुल्नेले नचुटे
meaning: Let the eater eat feces, but the speaker did not scratch.

text: गु पुछेको टालो पनी बेलामा काम लाग्छ
meaning: Even a patch used to wipe feces can be useful at the right time.
If you move feces, it stinks.

text: गुनले गुन खान्छ, तँलाई म खान्छु
meaning: Virtue eats virtue; I will eat you.

text: गुन्दुक पकाउनु पर्दैन, साली फकाउनु पर्दैन
meaning: You don't need to cook a gun, you don't need to coax a sister-in-law.
You don't need to cook a gun.

text: गुरु मान्नु बुझेर, बिहे गर्नु रोजेर, पानी खानु छानेर, कुरो गर्नु जानेर
meaning: Respect a teacher wisely, marry by choice, drink water after filtering, speak with knowledge.
The master is a lump, the disciple is sugar.
If you stir the lump, it stinks.
Feet and fists are warm.

text: गोरु नभएको हली र ठेडी नभएको हलोको के काम
meaning: What good is a plowman without an ox, or a plow without a beam?

text: गोलीको घाउ निको हुन्छ, बोली को हुँदैन
meaning: A bullet wound heals, but a wound from words never does.
No house or lineage, but a desire for a woman.

text: घर नखाएको छोरि, परदेश नखाएको छोरो
meaning: A daughter who doesn't eat at home, a son who doesn't eat abroad.

text: घर नभएको छोरो र सुत्केरी नभएको बुहारी
meaning: A son without a house, a daughter-in-law who hasn't given birth.
A tiger at home, a cat in the jungle.

text: घरमा चामल सकिएको दिन एकादशी, गोजीमा पैसो सकिएको दिन औंसी
meaning: The day rice runs out at home is Ekadashi; the day money runs out is new moon.

text: घरमा छैन तेल, खान खोज्छ सेल
meaning: No oil at home, but wants to eat a fried bread.
No broom at home, but a cigarette in the pocket.

text: घरै पिँडालु, बने पिँडालु, ससुराली गयो बाह हातको पिँडालु
meaning: Taro at home, taro in the forest; went to in-laws and got eight-hand taro.

text: घरै पोले पछि खरानीको के पिर
meaning: After burning the house, who cares about the ash?
Buy a necklace according to your neck.
Swallow a bone according to your throat.

text: घित न तेल पका बुढी सेल
meaning: No ghee or oil, cook old woman's fried bread.
Don't know how to pull, but blames the cook.
Spinning around, Rumjatar.
Planting a tuber does not yield rice.
A person who rides a horse eventually falls.
Where did the ghee spill? In the dal.

text: चकचके गोरुको चार ठाउँमा डाम, ठुलो माछो लड्यो समातेर खाम
meaning: A restless ox gets tied in four places; a big fish fell, caught and kept in a cage.
A rosary of rudraksha for an untouchable.
The pot of Ghaghmandu breaks.
Smoke hash, but don't lose heart.

text: चाँदो लाग्ने आगो र मुख लाग्ने नोकर
meaning: Fire that catches easily and a servant who talks back.
Don't cast the net without knowing the current.

text: चित्तीको पनि लोभ, पापाको पनि लोभ
meaning: Greed for a leopard, greed for a pigeon.

text: चित्ताले मरेपछि जलाउछ, चिन्ताले जिउदै जलाउछ
meaning: A leopard burns after death, worry burns while alive.
A leopard has a thousand pens.

text: चित्तीको भात भाते होइन, स्वास्नीको जात जाते होइन
meaning: A leopard's rice is not a meal; a woman's caste is not caste.

text: चिनीको नाम जपेर मुख गुलियो हुदैन
meaning: Chanting the name of sugar does not sweeten the mouth.
Neither know nor recognize, but ask for a push.

text: चीनको राजा भोटको नून ज्यानै दिए नि नदेख्ने गुन
meaning: The king of China and the salt of Tibet; even giving life doesn't show gratitude.
Sell an ox in Chaitra and buy a bird.

text: चोर ऑला अरु तिर, बॉकी ऑला ऑफे तिर
meaning: The thief comes from one side, the bucket comes from the other.

text: चोरको खुट्टा काट भन्दा खुट्टा उचाल्ने
meaning: Say cut the thief's foot, but he lifts his foot.
A thief's friend is a thief.

text: चोरको स्वर ठूलो, डॉकाको ऑखा ठूलो
meaning: The thief has a loud voice, the robber has big eyes.
A thief has a thousand tricks.
A crossroads for a thief, a stake for a saint.

text: चोरले अरुलाई पनि चोर नै देख्छ
meaning: A thief sees everyone else as a thief.

text: चौटा खान गएकी बूढी झोलमा डुबेर मरी
meaning: The old woman who went to eat chauta died drowning in the broth.
The youngest son does not take the headman's position.

text: छन् गेडी सबै मेरी छैनन् गेडी सबै टेढी
meaning: All buttons are mine, but not all buttons are crooked.

text: छाडेको पोइ र हिडेको स्वास्नीको नाम कसले लिन्छ
meaning: Who takes the name of a left husband and a walked-away wife?

text: छातीमा राखी कसले के नै लैजानु छ र
meaning: Keeping it on the chest, what can anyone take away?
The skin may go, but the black does not go away.
Jasmine oil on a shrew's head.

text: छेत्री बिग्रियो मोजले, नेवार बिग्रियो भोजले
meaning: A Chhetri is spoiled by pleasure, a Newar is spoiled by feasts.

text: छेपारोको मन्त्र नजान्ने, साँपको दुलाँ हात घुसाने
meaning: Doesn't know the lizard's mantra, but puts his hand into the snake's hole.

text: छोरि जन्मे ज्वाईलाई, छोरो जन्मे बुहारीलाई
meaning: When a daughter is born, it's for the son-in-law; when a son is born, it's for the daughter-in-law.
Beat the daughter and educate the daughter-in-law.

text: छोरीको बैंस बाबुले होइन अरुले देख्छन्
meaning: A daughter's youth is seen by others, not by her father.

text: छोरो उताउलो हूँदा घुँडा भाच्छ, छोरी उताउली हूँदा पोइला जान्छे
meaning: When a son is impatient, he breaks his knee; when a daughter is impatient, she goes to her husband's home.
Mangal in the jungle.
Wherever the slope goes, there goes the Ganges.

text: जता काफल पाक्छ, त्यता चरी नाच्छ
meaning: Wherever the Kafal fruit ripens, the bird dances there.
Wherever there is rice pudding, there is a crowd.

text: जति खान नपाएर मर्छेन, त्यो भन्दा बढी खान नजानेर
meaning: One doesn't die from not getting enough to eat, but from not knowing how to eat more.
The farther the distance, the deeper the love.
The less you sleep, the more you milk.
As many pots, so many splashes.
As many cooks, so many khichdis.
Republic for the people, neither joy nor sorrow.

text: जब भयो राती, तब बुढी ताती
meaning: When night falls, then the old woman warms up.

text: जलै बिष्णु थलै बिष्णु, फाठेर कहाँ फाल्नु
meaning: Vishnu in water, Vishnu on land; where to throw the scraped thing?

text: जसका छोरा उसका धन, जसका भैंसी उसका बन
meaning: He who has sons has wealth; he who has buffaloes has the forest.

text: जसकी आमा भान्छे, उसको छोरो भोके
meaning: Whose mother is a cook, his son is a beggar.

text: जसको छैन एक फाँक सुती, उसैले लगाउछ दस लाखको फुति
meaning: He who doesn't have a single strip of cotton blames others for a ten-million defect.
Whose drum it is, his rhythm.
Whose sword it is, his home and property.
He who owns the monkey makes it dance.
Whose stick it is, his buffalo.

text: जसको सिता खानु, उसको गीता गाउनु
meaning: Whose rice you eat, his song you sing.
As it came, so it went.

text: जसले बोक्छ भारी, खान्छ मेख मारी
meaning: He who carries the burden eats the marrow.

text: जसले पैसालाई चिन्दैन, तेस्लाई पैसाले पनी चिन्दैन
meaning: He who does not respect money, money does not respect him either.

text: जसले मह काढ्छ, उसले हात चाट्छ
meaning: He who extracts honey licks his hand.

text: जापानीले बेसार खाओस् न स्वाद पाओस्
meaning: Let the Japanese eat turmeric, maybe he'll taste it.

text: जसो जसो बराजु उसे उसे नाति
meaning: The more modest the elder, the more generous the grandson.

text: जसो जसो बाहुन बाजे, उसे उसे स्वाहा
meaning: The more like a Brahmin the grandfather, the more Swaha to him.

text: जित पाल्न भन्दा नाम पाल्न गाहो
meaning: It is harder to maintain a name than to maintain a victory.

text: जितेंदी कमारीको बाहबिसे पोइ, मदी कमारीको कोहि न कोहि
meaning: The victorious servant has a husband far away; the defeated servant has someone or another.
The procession of the winner, the funeral of the loser.

text: जिते हस्तिनापुरको राज, हारे चपरी मुनीको बास
meaning: Win and rule Hastinapur, lose and live under a thatch.

text: जुत्ता लगाउनेको चुरिफुरी खोला आए पछि देखिन्छ
meaning: A shoe wearer's sophistication is seen after the river comes.

text: जुत्ताको माला लगाएको नेता छाला देख्दा तर्सन्छ
meaning: A leader wearing a garland of shoes gets scared seeing leather.

text: जुन गोरुको सिंग छैन उसैको नाम तिखे
meaning: The ox that has no horns is named Tikhay.
Whichever hermit comes, his ear is already pierced.

text: जुन थालमा खायो, त्यही थालमा हग्छ
meaning: He eats in the same plate he defecates.

text: जुन नेता आए पनि घुस खान नछाड्ने
meaning: Whichever leader comes, he does not stop taking bribes.
The light of a firefly does not brighten heaven.
Do not count wealth earned from gambling.
The spade in elder brother's hand is easy.

text: जेठी बुढीको राम्रो कुरा तितो, कान्छीको चाहिँ झटारो नै मिठो
meaning: The good advice of the first wife is bitter, but even a quarrel with the youngest wife is sweet.
Whoever is the leader, the path is the same.
The thief himself has the loudest voice.
Whoever is the flier is the peacock.

text: जो निर्धन उसैको नाम धन प्रसाद
meaning: He who is poor, his name is Dhan Prasad.
Whoever is the witch is also the sniffer.
Whoever's hand, that is the support.
He who is short, a spike in his mouth.

text: जोईको जोई पोईको पोई हामी बीचमा कोई न कोई
meaning: Wife's wife, husband's husband; between us, there is someone.

text: जोगी देख्दा भैंसी तर्सिने, भैंसी देख्दा जोगी तर्सिने
meaning: Buffalo gets scared seeing a hermit, hermit gets scared seeing a buffalo.
A hermit is a guest at a hermit's house.
A hippie is a guest at a hermit's house.
If there is a grating sound, it feels sharp.
An elephant does not die from a fly's sting.
Killed the fly, but no handle or winnowing fan.

text: झुकेको शिर र भत्केको भिर प्रति कसैको आश हुदैन
meaning: No one has hope for a bowed head or a collapsed cliff.
A liar takes an oath quickly.
No matter how much you wash a leaf plate, it never becomes clean.

text: टपरीमा भात, हातमा सिन्को, निर्बाह भयो आजको दिनको
meaning: Rice on a leaf plate, a twig in hand, today's living is managed.
Just because it shines does not make it gold.

text: टाढाको देउता भन्दा नजिकको भुत काम लाग्छ
meaning: A nearby ghost is more useful than a faraway god.
A distant god, a garden ghost.
Hold the topknot and slap the cheek.

text: टुप्पीभन्दा माथि थात छैन, बाहूनभन्दा माथि जात छैन
meaning: There is no nest above the topknot, no caste above a Brahmin.
Even an orphan's day turns around.
God is the only support of an orphan.

text: टोपी न सोपी, कपाल केले छोपी
meaning: No cap or anything, what will cover the hair?
No place or fix, an old woman's desire.

text: ठाउँमा लगाए गाजल, कुठाउँमा लगाए मोसो
meaning: Put kajal in the right place, put soot in the wrong place.

text: ठाडो टिका लाउछे, स्वामी कहाँ धाउछे
meaning: She puts a vertical tika, where will she run for her husband?

text: ठेस लागेन भने उखुबारी पस्नु, ऋण लागेन भने जमानी बस्नु
meaning: If you don't get a push, don't enter the sugarcane field; if you don't have debt, don't stand as guarantor.
A cliff is not needed to get a push.
Don't enter the sugarcane field without getting a push.
A bread with mud smeared on a burnt mouth.
Fearful people have disgusting words.

text: डराउने मान्छेलाई रुखको ठुटो पनि बाघ बन्छ
meaning: For a fearful person, even a tree stump becomes a tiger.

text: डाँकाले खाएको धन, आगोले खाएको बन
meaning: Wealth eaten by a robber, forest eaten by fire.
Eat a deceiver's invitation and trust him.
The lump and the split are the same.
Even in Dikil Savaga, they pound rice.
Let it be the heart, but let it be a son.
While searching for a stone, found a god.

text: ढुंगाको भर माटो, माटोको भर ढुंगा
meaning: Soil depends on stone, stone depends on soil.

text: ढुटेकी छोरी कननकाको खानेमा परी, कननका देखेर उफेर मरी
meaning: The fallen daughter ended up eating at Kananko's, saw Kananka and jumped and died.
You dare, I will get it there.

text: तँ आउँदा मोही पाईनस, तेरो कमारी पठाईदे दही दिउँला
meaning: When you came, I didn't get a tenant; send your maidservant, I'll give you yogurt.

text: तँ कुटे जस्तो गर, म रोए जस्तो गर्छु
meaning: You do as if you beat me, I will do as if I cry.
A young woman's claim with a young man's company.

text: तरुनी हुँदा सयवटा पोई, मरन् बेला कोइ न कोइ
meaning: When young, a hundred husbands; at the time of death, someone or no one.

text: ताउलोमा जाउलो छैन, प्रधान शत्रु अमेरिका
meaning: No rice in the pot, but the main enemy is America.
When the occasion comes, a khukuri; otherwise, a lump.
Take aim and hit; after hitting, it's fate.
Let me eat it hot, even if it burns.
Can neither swallow nor spit out hot milk.
Hot water does not burn the house.

text: ताप्के ताते पो काम हुन्छ, बिँड मात्रै तातेर के काम
meaning: Work gets done only when the blade is hot; what is the use of just heating the handle?

text: तालिममा पसिना बगाउनेले लडाईमा रगत बगाउन पर्दैन
meaning: He who sweats in training does not have to shed blood in battle.
Escaped from the frying pan and fell into the floor.
The partridge's own mouth is its enemy.
Bitterness arose from one's own fault.

text: तिम्रो पोड लोते लोते, कसले दियो पोते
meaning: Your desire is dangling, who gave you the bead?
Thirst runs, the river does not run.
No pilgrimage or fasting, just a full belly.
Rain during Teej, tears of daughters.

text: तेरो पो धान छन्, कुट्यो खायो, आफ्ना त चामल छन्, कहिले निफन्नु कहिले केलाउनु
meaning: You have paddy, pounded and ate; I have rice, sometimes winnowing, sometimes sorting.
Less oil, more irritation.

text: तँ रानी म रानी, को भला कुवाको पानी
meaning: You are a queen, I am a queen; who is good for the well's water?
A ripe banana when tired.

text: थापा गयो नेपाल, खेत भयो सस्तै, कुलो लग्यो पहिरोले, जस्ताको तस्तै
meaning: Nepal lost its Thapa, fields became cheap; landslide took the canal, same as before.

text: थारुलाई दारु र मुसा भए केही चाहिँदैन
meaning: If a Tharu has liquor and a mouse, he needs nothing else.
Protect the mouth and the urinary organ.

text: थैली बलियो भए साथीको के कलम
meaning: If the purse is strong, what does a friend's pen matter?
A mouse's quilt in a dilapidated house.
Drip by drip, the ocean is formed.
No slap or anything, Priyanka Chopra.

text: थोरे भए ठिक्क, धेरे भए ठिक्क
meaning: Few is fine, many is also fine.
A tailor's clothes have the thread cut.
Just being born in a palace does not make everyone a king.

text: दरबारमा प्रवेश गर्दैमा साँढे राजा बन्दैन, बरु दरबार गोठ बन्छ
meaning: Just entering the palace does not make a bull a king; rather, the palace becomes a cowshed.
Bad times do not come playing music.

text: दशा लागेको बेला नभरेको बन्दुक पनि पडकन्छ
meaning: During bad times, even an unloaded gun goes off.
Can't finish the elder brother, won't keep the sister-in-law.

text: दाजुसँग काम लिनु छ भने भाउजु रिझाउनु, श्रीमान फकाउनु छ भने सासु रिझाउनु
meaning: If you want work from the elder brother, please the sister-in-law; if you want to coax the husband, please the mother-in-law.

text: दाहिने हातले खाप्पनि देख्ने हातले खाप्पनि पर्ने त उही मुखमा नै हो
meaning: Whether the right hand slaps or the seeing hand slaps, it falls on the same face.

text: दिउ आफू नाड्गो, नदिउ इष्ट बाड्गो
meaning: Give and I am naked, don't give and my friend is crooked.

text: दिउ आफू रितो, नदिउ इष्टको मुख बाड्गो
meaning: Give and I am empty, don't give and my friend's mouth is crooked.

text: दिन उजेली सुती बिताइ, रात उजेली बिस्कुन सुकाइ
meaning: Spent the bright day sleeping, drying biscuits in the bright night.

text: दिनमा कमिनी कपाल कोर रातमा कमिनी घोचा चोर
meaning: During the day, comb the servant's hair; at night, the servant is a thorn and a thief.

text: दुःखीलाई दिन्छु नभन्नू, विधवालाई लान्छु नभन्नु
meaning: Don't say 'I will give to the poor', don't say 'I will take the widow'.
You got trouble, Mangale, in your own way.

text: दुइ जोइको पोइ, कुना बसी रोइ
meaning: A husband of two wives sits in a corner and cries.
Two daughters-in-law, one nose ring.

text: दुई जोइको पोइ, अन्तिममा कोही न कोही
meaning: A husband of two wives, in the end, someone or no one.
The cat is the witness to the milk.

text: दुबो मौलाएँ मौलाउनु तर कुकुर बौलाएँ नबौलाउनु
meaning: Let the grass flourish, but let the dog not go mad.

text: दुर्गन्धित भन्ने थाहा पापपछि उधिनिरहनु पर्दैन
meaning: Knowing it stinks, you don't need to keep digging after sin.
You don't need to go far to find an enemy.

text: दूध दिने गाईको लाती पनि सहनुपर्छ
meaning: You have to bear the kick of a cow that gives milk.
If the seer's eyes burst, the listener's proof is gone.
God gives, the spender rejoices.
A shed for neither the gown nor the helper.

text: धन कमाई धाक, साथी कमाई लाख
meaning: Earning wealth is boast, earning a friend is a million.
Seeing wealth, even Lord Shiva has three eyes.

text: धन भने पछि महादेवको पनि तीन नेत्र
meaning: When wealth is mentioned, even Lord Shiva has three eyes.

text: धन परेको भन्दा मन परेको राम्रो
meaning: What is liked by the heart is better than what is liked by wealth.
Wealth remains, heart remains.

text: धर्ममा बसेकी स्वास्नी एउटैको, पोडला हिडेकी सबैको
meaning: A woman who stays in dharma is for one man; one who walks in desire is for everyone.

text: धाक भन्दा धक्कु ठुलो, हिड्ने बेला खुट्टा लुलो
meaning: The push is bigger than the boast; at the time of walking, the leg is lame.

text: धान खाने मुसा, चोट पाउने भ्यागुतो
meaning: The mouse eats the rice, the frog gets the beating.

text: धान पाके निहरन्छ, कोदो पाके ठडिन्छ
meaning: Rice bends when ripe, millet stands straight when ripe.

text: धेरै खाए मल, थोरै खाए बल
meaning: Eat too much, it's waste; eat a little, it's strength.

text: धेरै खायो भने चीनी पनि तितो हुन्छ
meaning: If you eat too much, even sugar becomes bitter.
When there are too many cats, the mice don't die.
A washerman's dog belongs to neither home nor the riverbank.
A washerman's dog is neither here nor there.

text: धोबीलाई हतार भयो भन्दैमा रातिमा घाम लाग्दैन
meaning: Just because a washerman is in a hurry doesn't mean the sun will rise at night.

text: न आमा पट्टिको न मामा पट्टिको
meaning: Neither from the mother's side nor from the uncle's side.

text: न धुँदा जाने, न रूँदा जाने
meaning: Doesn't know how to wash, doesn't know how to cry.
There is no cure for clumsiness.
Even to imitate, you need intelligence.

text: नखाउँ भने दिन भरीको सिकार, खाउँ भने कान्छा बाउको अनुहार
meaning: If I don't eat, it's a day-long hunt; if I eat, it's the face of the youngest father.

text: नडले चिमोटे हुनेलाई बन्चरो किन लगाउने
meaning: Why use a curved knife on someone who gets pinched without stepping?
Don't ask for the road to a village you don't know.
Don't use GPS for a city you don't know.
A nearby pilgrimage is neglected.
A battle you don't know is best not fought.
A miserly trader picks Wednesday (an inauspicious day to ask).

text: नदुखेको कपाल डोरी लगाई लगाई किन दुखाउनु
meaning: Why hurt hair that doesn't hurt by putting a rope on it again and again?
The river you don't trust will sweep you away.

text: नपाउनेले केरा पायो बियर संगै खायो
meaning: One who never gets anything got a banana and ate it with beer.

text: नपाउनेले केरा पायो बोक्रा समेत चपायो
meaning: One who never gets anything got a banana and chewed even the peel.

text: नपाउनेले केरा पायो, चियामा चोपी खायो
meaning: One who never gets anything got a banana, dipped it in tea and ate it.

text: नपाउनेले छोरो पायो, खेलाई खेलाई माया
meaning: One who never got a son got one, loves him by playing with him.
Neither forgets nor fears.
Only a dog goes where it's not called.
One who doesn't speak has no enemies.

text: नभएकी स्वास्नी कस्ती कस्ती, भएकी स्वास्नी सस्ती
meaning: A wife you don't have, what kind? A wife you have is cheap.
An unloaded gun clicks quickly.

text: नभेटुन्जेल उसैको पिरलो, भेटेपछि कुकुर र बिरालो
meaning: Worried about him until they meet; after meeting, like dogs and cats.
A hundred jerks for a lump that won't go down.
A new hermit rubs a lot of ash.
A new bride jingles her bangles a lot.
Even cotton gives intoxication.

text: नहुने मामा भन्दा काने मामा जाती
meaning: A one-eared uncle is better than an uncle who doesn't exist.
Chewing under the nose (muttering).
One who can't dance says the yard is crooked.
Grandmother's quilt in the great-granddaughter's trousers.
The grandmother is bigger than the granddaughter.

text: नाफा भए पेश, घाटा भए दशा
meaning: If profit, it's profession; if loss, it's fate.

text: नाम होस् या बदनाम, तर नहोस् गुमनाम
meaning: Whether name or bad name, may it not be anonymous.

text: नामदिक जोइ हुनुभन्दा मदिक कमारी हुनु जाति
meaning: Being a lowly maidservant is better than being a high-caste wife with a bad name.
Mange for the nameless.

text: नारीको भाग्य बिहान सोह्र साँझ चौसठ्ठी
meaning: A woman's fate: sixteen in the morning, sixty-four in the evening.
A lamp that is not forbidden shines brightly.

text: नेवार इस्ट र बाउ दुष्ट कहिल्यै हुँदैन
meaning: A Newar is never a friend, and a father is never evil.

text: नेवार बिग्रियो भोजले, बाहुन बिग्रियो मोजले
meaning: A Newar is spoiled by feasts, a Brahmin is spoiled by pleasure.

text: नौलो छँदा नौ पुलाको गाँस, पूरानो भएपछि जगल्टाको नाश
meaning: When new, nine pula of food; when old, the destruction of a heap.
Regret after killing the mongoose.
If you don't get justice, go to Gorkha.
Money in the waist pouch, rice in the begging bowl.

text: पदिलेखी छैन काम, चम्चागिगरी गरी खायो माम
meaning: No work from the office, spooned it and ate.
One is known by falling rather than by reading.

text: पढ्यो गुन्यो के काम, हलो जोत्यो खायो माम
meaning: What's the use of reading and counting? Plowed the field and ate.
A fish does not die from getting water.
The wound of sin never heals.

text: पापलाई पुण्य भन्नु र दिनलाई रात भन्नु एउटै हो
meaning: Calling sin virtue and calling day night is the same.

text: पायो पायो खेरायो, लास लिएर डेरायो
meaning: Got and lost, camped carrying a corpse.
A pit on one side, a cliff on the other.
Rather than the nourisher killing, the killer nourishes.

text: पासो मार्ने नचाहिँदा, शिकार मर्नु नचाहिँदो
meaning: When the trapper doesn't want to kill, the prey doesn't want to die.
A lump's brother-in-law, twelve months of Kusume.

text: पिर पर्दा पिर पिर, भात खाँदा मिरमिर
meaning: When in trouble, it's pain pain; when eating rice, it's munch munch.

text: पुकार्दा पुकार्दै पुग्छ, तर नपुगी पुग्दैन
meaning: Calling and calling, it arrives; but without arriving, it doesn't.
A butterfly does not get a butterfly's disease.
Crossing the bridge to drink water.

text: पूजा गर्न जाँदा ढुंगा फेला पर्नु
meaning: Finding a stone while going to worship.

text: पूज्य पुर्खाको बाटो र फोहोर पानीको बाटो एउटै
meaning: The path of honorable ancestors and the path of dirty water are the same.
Leaving the stomach and attacking the mouth.
The fire in the stomach does not burn the feet.
Money and others are equal.

text: पोइ गयो नेपाल, बुहारी बनिन् सक्कल
meaning: Husband went to Nepal, the daughter-in-law became real.

text: पोइ मरेपछि बुहारी साइली, साइली मरेपछि बुहारी पोइ
meaning: After husband dies, daughter-in-law becomes sister; after sister dies, daughter-in-law becomes husband.

text: पोइको मुख हेर्नु र छाती हेर्नु एउटै
meaning: Looking at a husband's face and looking at his chest is the same.

text: पोइको मुखमा हेर्दा, आफ्नै खुट्टा तर्फ हेर्नु
meaning: When looking at a husband's face, look at your own feet.

text: पोइलाई राँको देखाउनु, आँफै कालो हुनु
meaning: Showing a torch to the husband, becoming black oneself.
Bead and pliers in the same bag.

text: पोल्टो फोरेको मान्छेलाई कौडी पनि काम लाग्छ
meaning: For someone who has burst his bag, even a cowrie shell is useful.
To step on the toe and jump.

text: प्याज बिना भात हुँदैन, प्याज बिना खेत हुँदैन
meaning: No rice without onion, no field without onion.

text: प्रश्न लिएर ऋणी हुनु, उत्तर लिएर लेनदार हुनु
meaning: Become a debtor by taking a question, become a creditor by taking an answer.
A heron's tail is twelve finger-lengths.

text: बक्रको बच्चा एकै ठाउँ, सर्पको बच्चा वनैभरि
meaning: A heron's baby is in one place, a snake's baby is all over the forest.

text: बग्ने पानी बगिहाल्छ, रहने छातीमा रहिहाल्छ
meaning: Running water keeps running, what remains stays in the chest.
If there is a traveler, the path is decorated.

text: बट्टुले काम नपाएपछि बन्दुकमा बत्ती लगाउने
meaning: When BATTU doesn't get work, lights the gun.
Speech for the monkey, a blouse for the monkey.
The root of the forest, the stake of the hedge.

text: बनको हात्ती बाह्रै खर्च, पाल्तु हात्ती आधा खर्च
meaning: A wild elephant costs twelve, a tamed elephant costs half.
The arrow of the wilderness is with Laxman.

text: बन्दुकको गोली एक फन्को, मुखको गोली सय फन्को
meaning: A bullet goes one round, a word goes a hundred rounds.

text: बर्ष बर्षमा पोहोर फर्कन्छ, तर कहिल्यै उस्तै हुँदैन
meaning: Time returns year after year, but never the same.

text: बर्षभरि रुनेको एउटै दिन हाँस्नु बर्षभरि हाँस्नेको एउटै दिन रुनु
meaning: One who cries all year laughs one day; one who laughs all year cries one day.

text: बस्छु भने पशुपति, नबस्छु भने गोश्वारा
meaning: If I stay, Pashupati; if I don't stay, Goshwara.

text: बाउ आफू भन्काउने, छोरा भन्काउने काम
meaning: Father bends himself, son's job is to bend.

text: बाउ गयो बन बास, छोरो आयो घर बास
meaning: Father went to forest exile, son came to home stay.
Father is a curved knife, son is a father curved knife.

text: बाघ आउँदा भाले बासी, तर्सिने बेला रातो कापी
meaning: When the tiger comes, the rooster crows; at the time of fear, a red notebook.

text: बाघ आयो बाघ आयो, भाग्ने अगाडि ढुङ्गा आयो
meaning: Tiger came, tiger came; while running away, a stone came in front.

text: बाघ उछाल्न खोजे स्यालै स्याल, बाघ उछाल्न नखोजे स्यालै स्याल
meaning: Try to chase the tiger, jackals everywhere; don't try to chase the tiger, jackals everywhere.

text: बाघ बुढो स्याल तन्नेरी एक हुँदैन
meaning: Old tiger and young jackal are never the same.

text: बाघ मरेपछि छालाले बाँच्छ, मान्छे नामले
meaning: After a tiger dies, its skin lives; a person lives by his name.
A tiger does not eat a sniff.

text: बाघ समाउन गएको, खरायोले खस्र्याक्क गर्दा मुर्छा
meaning: Went to catch a tiger, fainted when a rabbit rustled.
A tiger has a hundred pens.
A jackal's quilt in a tiger's skin.
A tiger's son is a jackal.

text: बाघको न्यास्रो लागे बिरालोको अनुहार हेर्नु
meaning: When a tiger sneezes, look at the cat's face.

text: बाघको बाटो बाघ हिँड्छ, सर्पको बाटो सर्प
meaning: A tiger walks the tiger's path, a snake walks the snake's path.

text: बाघको मुख खाए पनि रातै, नखाए पनि रातै
meaning: Whether eaten by a tiger or not, it's night.

text: बाघले निचोरेको वन र वनले निचोरेको बाघ हुँदैन
meaning: There is no forest squeezed by a tiger or tiger squeezed by the forest.

text: बाच्छो खाने बाघले पाडोलाई नन बाँकी राख्दैन
meaning: A tiger that eats a calf does not leave the buffalo calf uneaten.
No road or path, the chase is lame.
A monkey's tail is neither a tie nor a belt.
A monkey's tail is neither a stick nor a weapon.
A coconut in a monkey's hand.
A cat does not become thin from a barrier.

text: बाबू भन्दा छोरो जान्ने, नाति पेटैबाट मट्याङ्ग्या हान्ने
meaning: The son knows more than the father; the grandson hits the mud pie from the womb.

text: बारी न बिक्वा नौ मुरी तोरी
meaning: No field or plot, nine muri of mustard.

text: बान्ह छोरा तेन्ह नाति, बूढाको धोक्रो काँधी माथि
meaning: The same son, the same grandson; the old man's bundle is on the shoulder.

text: बाह्र छोरा तेन्ह नाति, बूढाको मन तरुनी माथि
meaning: Twelve sons, the same grandson; the old man's mind is on young women.
Even a river turns back in twelve years.
A young celibate, winks when he sees a woman.
Squeezing sand does not produce oil.

text: बाहिर बाहिर लोकाचार भित्र भित्र पोका पार
meaning: Outwardly custom, inwardly separate.
A Brahmin's mind is like a fly's gall.
A Brahmin's topknot is neither aerial nor antenna.
A Brahmin's property goes for the price of a he-goat.

text: बाहुनको सेखी झाना नेवारले भाँडाको धोती लगाउछ
meaning: A Brahmin's boast is fake; a Newar wears a pot's loincloth.
Give to the Brahmin, sugar on the mud.

text: बाहुनले च्याउ खाओस् न स्वाद पाओस्
meaning: Let the Brahmin eat mushrooms, maybe he'll taste it.

text: बाह्र बर्ष बाइबल पढायो, भूकम्प आउँदा राम राम
meaning: Taught the Bible for twelve years, when the earthquake came, 'Ram Ram'.

text: बाह्र बर्ष रामायण पढायो, सीता कस्की जोई
meaning: Taught the Ramayana for twelve years, whose wife is Sita?

text: बाह्र बर्षमा पोइ आयो, मै रोइलीलाई ज्वरो आयो
meaning: The husband came after twelve years, and I, Roili, got a fever.
Education is the real wealth.
A garland of vermilion around a cat's neck.

text: बिहे गर्ने अलमलमा केटी खोज्न बिर्सियो
meaning: In the hurry to get married, forgot to look for a girl.
A vermilion noose in a cat's hand.
For those who understand, sandalwood; for those who don't, the handle of a ladle.
Budhanilkantha, Naranthan, co-wives fighting each other.

text: बुढी मरी भनेर होइन काल पल्क्यो भनेर डराउनु पर्छ
meaning: Not that the old woman died, but that bad times have started.
In old age, living at the rest house.

text: बुढो पोइले हसाउँछ, ठिटो पोइले रुवाउँछ
meaning: An old husband makes you laugh, a young husband makes you cry.

text: बुहारीको छाती हेरी गाउँले अघाए, नाति केटो भोके
meaning: Villagers were satisfied looking at the daughter-in-law's chest; the grandson boy became a beggar.
When the old man dies, the promises shift.
The old woman died, bad times began.

text: बेलामा छोरा छोरीलाई नकुटेपछि आफ्नो छाती पिट्नु पर्छ
meaning: If you don't beat your children on time, you'll have to beat your own chest later.

text: बैंक लुट्नेलाई भन्दा समाउन जाने पुलिसलाई लाज
meaning: More shame on the police who go to catch than on the bank robber.
The rented sister-in-law, the young brother-in-law.
The virtuous one was killed by virtue.
When the enemy smiles, the response works.
A pumpkin in a he-goat's mouth.

text: बोकाले दाइ हुने भए गोरु किन चाहिन्थ्यो
meaning: If a he-goat could be an elder brother, why would an ox be needed?

text: बोकाले रोपाइ हुने भए गोरु किन चाहियो
meaning: If a he-goat could do the transplanting, why would an ox be needed?
Speak, speak, fish, with your mouth full of water.
Once words and bullets are released, they don't come back.

text: बोलेर बाठो र दौडेर छिटो कहिल्यै हुँदैन
meaning: Being clever by talking and being fast by running never happens.

text: बोल्नेको पिठो बिक्छ, नबोल्नेको चामल पनि बिक्दैन
meaning: The flour of the talker sells, the rice of the non-talker does not.

text: ब्रत बस्ने हामी फलाहार खाने कामी
meaning: We observe the fast, the blacksmith eats the fruits.

text: भंगेरो मार्न सजिलो हुन्छ, भुत्ल्याउन गाह्रो
meaning: It's easy to kill a mole cricket, hard to untangle.
If there is, it's fine; if not, the old man's funeral.
The storekeeper said, the lump stabbed.
When you have to say something, say it after bringing it to the wall.

text: भन्नेलाई के छ र, चिनेर आउँदा खाना छ
meaning: What does the speaker have? When you come after recognizing, there is food.

text: भरोसा राखे घर बन्छ, नराखे डेरा पनि बन्दैन
meaning: With trust, a house is built; without trust, even a rented place is not built.

text: भाँडा चलाउने सुनार, आगो चलाउने लोहार
meaning: The goldsmith handles the pot, the blacksmith handles the fire.

text: भाँडो सुनले के, भनाइ मुनले के
meaning: What does a pot matter with gold? What does a saying matter with gem?

text: भाग्यले पाइन्छ छोरो, धनले पाइन्छ जोई
meaning: A son is obtained by fate, a daughter-in-law by wealth.

text: भाग्यले पाउँदा खै के छ, नपाउँदा के छैन
meaning: What does one have when fate gives? What does one not have when fate doesn't?
The flute and the tear are in the same basket.
The bear earns, the jackal eats.
Disease inside, gold medicine outside.

text: भुतले पो पुजारी भएर पो बाचेको
meaning: Only by becoming a ghost's priest did he survive.

text: भुइँ चुलोको राजा, आफू लुकेर खाजा
meaning: The king of the ground stove, hiding and eating snacks.

text: भुइँ लगाउन सजिलो, भुइँ माथि उठाउन गाह्रो
meaning: Easy to level to the ground, hard to lift above ground.
A whirlpool drowns by its own feet.
Fried is fried, cooked is cooked.

text: भूल त कस्तूरीको मृगलाई पनि लाग्छ
meaning: Even the musk deer makes mistakes.

text: भेडाको ऊन पनि उत्तिकै, सबै उत्तिकै
meaning: Sheep's wool is all the same, everything is the same.

text: भोकै बस्नु भन्दा बोकेर खानु बेस
meaning: Better to carry and eat than to stay hungry.

text: भोकै बसेको भोकै मर्छ, बोलेको बोलेइ मर्छ
meaning: The hungry dies hungry, the speaker dies speaking.

text: भोकै सुतेको भोकै उठ्छ, भन्न नजानेको भन्नै जान्दैन
meaning: He who sleeps hungry wakes hungry; he who doesn't know how to speak never learns.

text: भोटले पार्यो भोट, राणाले पार्यो राणा
meaning: Tibetans made Tibet, Ranas made Rana.

text: भोटेलाई पिँडालु र बोकेलाई बासी भात एउटै
meaning: Taro for a Tibetan and stale rice for a carrier are the same.

text: भोत, भन्नु भनेको गोरुलाई सिङ र पुच्छर
meaning: 'Bhot' means horns and tail for an ox.

text: भोलि भनेको छैन विश्वास, मानिसको के आश्वास
meaning: Tomorrow is not trustworthy, what assurance for a person?
What is the use of Singhadurbar for not committing corruption?
'Bhwai' is bigger than 'Swai'.

text: मकैको रोटीमा घिउ हाल्न र माइतको सम्पतिमा जित हाल्न बेकार छ
meaning: Putting ghee on corn bread and claiming victory over parental property is useless.

text: मन नपर्ने जेठी बुहारीले पकाएको खिर पनि गनाउँछ, मन पर्ने कान्छी बुहारीको पाद पनि बसाउँछ
meaning: Even rice pudding made by the disliked eldest daughter-in-law stinks; even the fart of the liked youngest daughter-in-law stays fragrant.
The liked boy is the elder brother-in-law.
A liked flower is juicy even after drying.

text: मन पर्ने मान्छेको दुर्गन्ध नै सुगन्ध
meaning: For a liked person, even bad smell is fragrance.
Eat the heart's laddu with ghee.
Cold enters the mind.

text: मन्त्री हुनु कहिले कहिले, कमिसन थाप्नु पहिले
meaning: Becoming a minister is occasional, taking commission comes first.

text: मरी जाने चोला, उडी जाने सास
meaning: The body dies, the breath flies away.
There is nothing to take by dying.
Plucking the whiskers of a dead tiger.

text: मरेको बिरालो काखी घ्यापेर ठिमीको उकालो
meaning: Holding a dead cat in the lap while climbing Thimi's uphill.
After death, even a Dumai is a king.
A man has ten strengths.
Even fire backs away from a man's moustache.
Before dying, come and stretch out.
Better to go mad than to die.
A green bamboo pole at the time of death.
When you have to die, die by pulling your own legs.

text: मलाई खाने बाघले तँलाई पनि खान सक्छ
meaning: The tiger that eats me can eat you too.

text: महाकालीले हानेका जनता एमसीसी चम्किंदा तर्सिन्छन्
meaning: People struck by Mahakali get scared when MCC glitters.
A spider's web is a fly's doom.

text: मागेको गोरु, चोरेको हलो, बाँच्नु भन्दा मरेकै भलो
meaning: A begged ox, a stolen plow; better to die than to live.
A beggar does not have the right to choose.
Count a beggar's wealth ten times.
Hot rice for a beggar.

text: माछा देखे दुलो भित्र हात, सर्प देखे दुलो बाहिर हात
meaning: When you see a fish, put your hand in the hole; when you see a snake, take your hand out of the hole.
A fish's strength is only in water.
Fish fish, frog.
Fish as a gift in a fisherman's house.

text: माझीको मतो गर्दा सात गाउँ डुबे
meaning: When the fisherman insisted, seven villages drowned.

text: माझीले सल्लाह गर्दागर्दै सात गाउँ डुब्यो
meaning: While the fisherman was deliberating, seven villages sank.
The wooden mug for the clay pot person.
Plant one mana and reap a muri.

text: मान्छे खेदाउनु अगाडिबाट, वस्तु खेदाउनु पछाडिबाट
meaning: Chase a person from the front, chase a thing from behind.

text: मान्छेमा ईख, सर्पमा विष नभए कोही डराउँदैन
meaning: If people had no envy and snakes no venom, no one would be afraid.
A Kulaka's praise in front of the maternal uncle.

text: मामा आउँदा केरा पाकेन, केरा पाक्दा मामा आएनन्
meaning: When the uncle came, bananas weren't ripe; when bananas ripened, the uncle didn't come.
On the uncle's horse, the nephew's 'hey hey'.
Killing is sin, keeping is virtue.
Ram Ram in the mouth, a dagger in the collar.

text: मुखमा लगाउन चिलाउनेको गेडो छैन, कुन्नि के जातिमा लगाउन जाइफल
meaning: Itching to put on the face has no bead; what caste does one put nutmeg on?

text: मुखमा सरस्वती हुनेको सधैं वृहस्पति आउँछ
meaning: One who has Saraswati in the mouth always has Brihaspati come.
For a heart-thief, neither Pashupati nor Griheshwari.
A fool and money are soon finished.
A fool's wealth does not last.
My ox's path is straight.
The fruit of hard work is sweet.
Ask for a tenant, hide the winnowing basket.

text: मौका आउँछ पर्खिँदैन, बगेको खोला फर्किँदैन
meaning: Opportunity comes but doesn't wait; a flown river doesn't return.
You must know how to hit a four when the opportunity comes.
In opportunity, even a leper's foot must be valued.
You must be able to break even a diamond when the opportunity arises.
Neither here nor there, a shoe in the hand.

text: युद्धको बेलामा बुद्धको पुराण काम लाग्दैन
meaning: In times of war, Buddha's Purana is of no use.

text: राजाको अगाडि र घोडाको पछाडि नलाग्नु, लात खाइन्छ
meaning: Don't stand before a king or behind a horse; you'll get kicked.
The king's work is notorious everywhere.
Left the king's work for the blacksmith's doorstep.
Shortage of salt in the king's house.

text: राजाको धन जान्छ, भण्डारेको पेट पोल्छ
meaning: The king's wealth goes, the storekeeper's stomach burns.

text: राजाको मिति बाह्र वर्ष प्रजातन्त्रमा राखे पनि बाङ्गाको बाङ्गै
meaning: Even if the king's date is kept in democracy for twelve years, the crooked remains crooked.
What need for a husband in a house of blankets?
Night or queen.
After night passes, the morning dawns.
Cried all night, the donation got lost.

text: रात राम्रो जुनले, मान्छे राम्रो गुनले
meaning: Night is good for the moon, a person is good for qualities.
Cursed all night, the moneylender is still alive.

text: रातभरी रामायण पढायो, सीता कस्की जोइ
meaning: Taught Ramayana all night, whose wife is Sita?
Old woman crying all night is still alive.

text: राम राम सीता पोइ, मर्ने बेला कोही न कोही
meaning: Ram Ram, Sita's husband; at the time of death, someone or no one.
With Ravan's death, Lanka does not become empty.

text: रिस खा आफू, बुद्धि खा अरु
meaning: Eat anger yourself, eat wisdom from others.
Who reads the Vedas in a fit of anger?
Do not trust one who does not have a bell.
Kajal does not stop crying eyes.

text: रोटी चिल्लो मिठो, कुरा खस्रो मिठो
meaning: Bread is smooth and sweet, words are rough and sweet.
What push does a lucky son need?
Defecation at the time of auspicious moment.
What use is a bead after the auspicious moment?
Torn waistband, a embroidered handkerchief.

text: लड्का जित्ने हनुमान जस पाउने ढेडु
meaning: Hanuman who wins battles gets praise; the monkey gets the credit.
When you pull the vine, the mountain roars.
When you pull the vine, the mountain does not roar.
In a land of lazy people, the butt is young.
In a land of lazy people, the butt is young.

text: लाटो लड्छ एक बल्ड्याङ, बाठो लड्छ तीन बल्ड्याङ
meaning: A mute falls with one roll, a clever one falls with three rolls.
A horse of a kick does not obey words.
A ghost of a kick does not obey words.
The taker has no decision, the giver is in a hurry.
The giver is in more hurry than the taker.

text: लालमायाको त पत्तै छैन, खस्ने कामिको खसखस
meaning: No trace of Lalimaya, but the falling blacksmith's poppy.
Written document does not work in front of time.
Looted wealth for the grandfather's shraddha.

text: ले ले बाबु गुलेली, मारिदिउँला जुरेली
meaning: Take, take, father, a slingshot; I will kill the mosquito.
A husband-wife quarrel is like a straw fire.
Greed leads to gain, gain leads to lament.
A greedy person's wealth is eaten by a youngster.
As long as the greedy live, the sinful do not die hungry.

text: लौरो टेके भर हुन्छ, कान्छी ल्याए घर हुन्छ
meaning: Leaning on a stick is enough; bringing a young wife makes a home.

text: ल्हासामा सुन छ, कान मेरो बुच्चै
meaning: There is gold in Lhasa, but my ear is pierced.

text: वचन फेनु र बाबु फेनु उस्तै हो
meaning: The word 'phenu' and 'father phenu' are the same.

text: वल्लो घरको नरे, पल्लो घरमा सरे
meaning: The male of this house moved to the other house.
Neither this riverbank nor the other shore.
In a merchant's house, everyone is a priest.
A pit on this side, a cliff on the other side.
At the time of destruction, the mind works backwards.

text: विष नभएको सर्प र ईख नभएको मानिस काम लाग्दैन
meaning: A snake without poison and a person without envy are useless.

text: विष्टको घरमा भात पाक्दा दमाईको घरमा खलबल
meaning: When rice cooks in a Bisht's house, there is chaos in a tailor's house.

text: विसौलीको झिंगा फड्कनु भन्दा धानीको टाउको हल्लाउनु बेस
meaning: Better to shake a grain owner's head than to swing a wasp.
A doctor's goiter is like a widow's daughter.
If you don't see an enemy, look at your brother's face.
If no enemy, raise relatives.
One should not count the death of a refuge-seeker.
No cap on the head, a river on the feet.
Dhaturo does not affect Lord Shiva.
Venus rose, the pumpkin ran.

text: शोक न सुतार, भोक न भकारी
meaning: No grief for the carpenter, no hunger for the storekeeper.
Camphor for sandalwood, dhaturo for hemp.

text: श्रीमती कति बाठी, बोका स्टाईलको केश काटी
meaning: No matter how clever the wife, the he-goat cuts the stylish hair.

text: श्रीमतीको पिटाई खाएको लोग्ने चुरा बज्दा तर्सिन्छ
meaning: A husband who has been beaten by his wife gets scared when bangles jingle.
Company is the fruit of virtue.

text: संगै बसी सुती सकी, लाज मान्दै घुम्टो कसी
meaning: Lived and slept together, then shyly tightened the veil.
Friends together on top of Singhadurbar.

text: सज्जनसंगको मितेरी शिलापत्र, दुर्जनसंगको मितेरी अलपत्र
meaning: Friendship with the noble is like a stone inscription; friendship with the wicked leaves one helpless.

text: सत्यको धन रहन्छ, असत्यको धन रहँदैन
meaning: Wealth earned through truth remains, wealth through falsehood does not.

text: शत्रु पछ्याउने भाइ, तन्नेरी पछ्याउने बुहारी
meaning: A brother who chases an enemy, a daughter-in-law who chases a young man.
When going on a dream pilgrimage, you must smoke a cigarette.

text: सब लफडा थुतुन र मुतुनले निम्त्याउँछ
meaning: All troubles are caused by the mouth and the urinary organ.

text: सबै कुकुर काशी गए गु कसले खाने
meaning: If all dogs go to Kashi, who will eat the feces?
Left everything, hand under the tail.
My co-father-in-law's stubbornness got me ghee too.
A hundred people's stick, one person's burden.
Government work: when will the sun come?

text: सर्प पनि मरोस्, लट्ठी पनि नभाँचियोस्
meaning: May the snake die, but may the stick not break.
A snake sees a snake's feet.
An impotent man's quilt on his in-law's wealth.
Cheap turmeric causes diarrhea.
The bull's fight, the calf's trampling.
Love for interest is greater than love for the principal.

text: साउनको भेललाई बेलामा रोक्न सके बाली राम्रो हुन्छ
meaning: If you can stop the Shrawan flood in time, the crop becomes good.

text: साउनमा आँखा फुटेको गोरूले बाह्रै महिना हरियो देख्छ
meaning: An ox that loses its eyes in Shrawan sees green all twelve months.
A small heart does not cook fat.

text: सानो छउन्जेल मर्ला भन्ने पीर, ठूलो भएपछि मार्ला भन्ने पीर
meaning: When small, the worry is 'will I die?' When grown, the worry is 'will he kill me?'
A mirror for the small, comfort for the big.
A witness's curse does not kill a frog.
In hope of the sister-in-law, the brother-in-law's exile.

text: सासूको माया छोरी छउन्जेल, बुहारीको माया छोरा छउन्जेल
meaning: Mother-in-law's love lasts as long as the daughter is there; daughter-in-law's love lasts as long as the son is there.
No work for the soldier, but honor for the general.
A crow's sack in the pod of a bean.

text: सियो बनेर पस्ने, फाली बनेर निस्कने
meaning: Enter as a needle, exit as a blade.
Like a tailor who lost his needle.
Found in Sitem, a dry Bhattit.

text: सुख पाए ससुराली जानु, दुःख पाए मीतकहाँ जानु
meaning: In happiness, go to the in-laws; in sorrow, go to a friend.

text: सुगुरलाई स्वर्ग जान्छस् भन्दा त्यहाँ गु खान पाइन्छ भनी उल्टो सोध्छ
meaning: Tell a pig 'go to heaven', it asks back 'can I eat feces there?'

text: सुघरी स्वास्नीको पोइ मोटाउँछ, फोहोरी स्वास्नीको कुकुर मोटाउँछ
meaning: A clean wife's husband grows fat; a dirty wife's dog grows fat.
Gold does not need to be coated.

text: सुनारको सय चोट, लोहारको एक चोट
meaning: A goldsmith's hundred blows, a blacksmith's one blow.
Sun sets, moon is happy.
A lamp in front of the sun.
Sorutha sala satra.

text: सौताको रिसले श्रीमानको काखमा पिसाब फेर्नु
meaning: Out of anger at the co-wife, urinate in the husband's lap.
When the jackal cries, the chicken disappears.

text: स्यालको शिकार गर्न जाँदा बाघको तयारी गर्नुपर्छ
meaning: When going to hunt a jackal, you must prepare for a tiger.

text: स्वास्थ राम्रो चेकअपले, केटी राम्रो मेकअपले
meaning: Health is good with a checkup, a girl is good with makeup.

text: स्वास्नीको अगाडि किम जोडे पनि बिरालो
meaning: Even if you tie a kim in front of a woman, it's a cat.

text: स्वास्नीमान्छेको थर छैन, लोग्ने मान्छेको घर छैन
meaning: A woman has no surname, a man has no home.
At the sickle's wedding, a song for the grass.
Defecation is bigger than walking.
Went to defecate, forgot the back.
Defecate, defecate; if you urinate, it will cut.
After defecating, saw the door.
More shame for the watcher than for the defecator.
Looking for a wheel while defecating.
Hasty work ends up being messed up.
Mustard does not grow on the palm of the hand.
A lost cow is an offering to the sun.
Seeing Harip, even fate gets scared.
Even if you lose heart, don't smoke hashish.
Nutmeg for the one who never loses.
The one who never loses boasts of nutmeg.
Sand in the halwa.

text: हलेदो भन्ने थाहा पाएपछि कोट्याउनु पर्दैन
meaning: Once you know it's turmeric, you don't need to scratch.
Hugging the plow and beating the ox.
Cut the plow and twisted it.
An ox does not give birth just by plowing.
A loose tooth will fall out one day.

text: हाँसी हाँसी कसेको गाँठो रोई रोई फुकाउनुपर्छ
meaning: A knot tied laughing must be untied crying.
A book in hand, ten things in mind.

text: हातीको दुइटा दात हुन्छ, एउटा खाने अर्को देखाउने
meaning: An elephant has two tusks: one for eating, one for showing off.
An elephant came, an elephant came... phussa (nothing).

text: हाती उडाउने बतास आयो पिउरी खोज्छेस् राँड
meaning: The wind that flies an elephant came, the widow searches for flattened rice.

text: हाती चढिसकेको मान्छेले गधा चढ्न के रुचाउला
meaning: One who has ridden an elephant, why would he like to ride a donkey?
There was an elephant, the tail measured it.
Elephant walks, horse shines.
A cumin seed in an elephant's mouth.

text: हातको माछा छोडेर पोखरीको माछा खोज्ने
meaning: Leave the fish in hand and search for the fish in the pond.
A defeated dog always shows its teeth.
The ox that is hit has only one trick left.
Without the wind blowing, the leaf does not shake.
Is walking, is wiping the footsteps.
The walking ox gets beaten.
A worm does not know the value of a diamond.
The old woman's share is a tooth.
A plant that will grow has shiny leaves.
The one who will lose loses; fate cannot be stopped.

text: हुलमुलमा जिउ जोगाउनु, अनिकालमा बिउ जोगाउनु
meaning: Save your body in the crowd, save your seed in famine.

text: हेरेर मर्नु भन्दा छेरेर मर्नु जाती
meaning: Better to die scattering than to die watching.
While looking, a bird; while falling, a curved knife.
Looking at the shape, a curry to eat for the day.
There is no reliance on looking and scattering.

text: हैन भने बाटो पनि छैन, छ भने बाटो पनि छ
meaning: If not, there is no path; if there is, there is a path.

text: होचो आउँदा घोचो, अग्लो आउँदा अग्लो
meaning: When the short comes, a spike; when the tall comes, tall.
Conscious oneself, unconscious others.
A rumor does not walk without noise.

text: ह्याङ आउँदा खाना छ, ह्याङ जाँदा खाना छैन
meaning: When Hyang comes, there is food; when Hyang goes, there is no food.
